rules_extracted: Truth check (root/branch/HEAD/status) is mandatory and recorded.
Writes must stay in explicitly allowed roots; forbidden roots are hard stop.
No fake green: PASS claims require concrete evidence artifacts.
Big-model runs must include KPD self-review and script preservation classification.
Taskpack rules do not override canonical authority (anti-crutch).
response_contract_summary: Final owner response must include step, full report path, verdict, RU owner comment, and next allowed task.
Do not claim implementation/finality without receipts.
Auto-commit is disabled for this task; Owner decides commit.
language_contract_summary: Machine-readable artifacts: English and UTF-8 safe.
Owner-facing report/comment: Russian is allowed and expected.
No mojibake; bilingual UI principle applies to owner-facing applications.
no_fake_green_rules: PASS is blocked if required deliverables are missing.
PLAUSIBLE/UNKNOWN evidence cannot support PASS verdict.
Validator output and git status must be reported honestly.
